name: BaseHead renders correctly with minimal props
fullName: root:packages/@studiocms/blog/test/components/index.test.ts#@studiocms/blog Tests BaseHead renders correctly with minimal props

steps.name: Verifying rendered HTML structure and content

expect("<meta charset=\"utf-8\"/><meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1\"/><title>Test Title</title><link rel=\"canonical\" href=\"https... <truncated>).toContain("<title>Test Title</title>")

expect("<meta charset=\"utf-8\"/><meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1\"/><title>Test Title</title><link rel=\"canonical\" href=\"https... <truncated>).toContain("<meta name=\"description\" content=\"Test Description\"/>")

expect("<meta charset=\"utf-8\"/><meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1\"/><title>Test Title</title><link rel=\"canonical\" href=\"https... <truncated>).toContain("<meta property=\"og:title\" content=\"Test Title\"/>")

expect("<meta charset=\"utf-8\"/><meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1\"/><title>Test Title</title><link rel=\"canonical\" href=\"https... <truncated>).toContain("<meta property=\"og:description\" content=\"Test Description\"/>")

expect("<meta charset=\"utf-8\"/><meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1\"/><title>Test Title</title><link rel=\"canonical\" href=\"https... <truncated>).toContain("<meta name=\"twitter:title\" content=\"Test Title\"/>")

expect("<meta charset=\"utf-8\"/><meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1\"/><title>Test Title</title><link rel=\"canonical\" href=\"https... <truncated>).toContain("<meta name=\"twitter:description\" content=\"Test Description\"/>")

expect("<meta charset=\"utf-8\"/><meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1\"/><title>Test Title</title><link rel=\"canonical\" href=\"https... <truncated>).toContain("<meta name=\"generator\" content=\"StudioCMS v0.0.0-test\"/>")

expect("<meta charset=\"utf-8\"/><meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1\"/><title>Test Title</title><link rel=\"canonical\" href=\"https... <truncated>).toContain("<meta name=\"generator\" content=\"Astro")

expect("<meta charset=\"utf-8\"/><meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1\"/><title>Test Title</title><link rel=\"canonical\" href=\"https... <truncated>).toContain("<meta property=\"og:locale\" content=\"en\"/>")
